# String Repetition

String repetition operator

```perl
$repeated = $string x $count;
```

## Expected Compilation Outcomes

### Clean Perl Output

```perl
$repeated = $string x $count;
```

### Typed Perl Output

```perl
$repeated = $string x $count;
```
